title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.130 - Ferriage, when tendered
text:
237.130.  Ferriage, when tendered. — No ferryman shall be compelled to do any act, as such, before payment or tender of his fee be made, according to the rates of ferriage.
(RSMo 1939 § 15296) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14208; 1919 § 5542; 1909 § 6485
